title: Currently
subtitle: Actively advancing into next-generation AI architectures and frameworks to stay at the forefront of the field.

items.title: Agentic AI & Autonomous Agents
items.desc: Mastering the design of autonomous AI systems capable of tool use, persistent memory, goal decomposition, and self-correction. Implementing production multi-agent workflows with LangGraph, AutoGen, and CrewAI — moving beyond simple chains into genuinely autonomous systems.

items.title: Advanced RAG & Retrieval Systems
items.desc: Advancing beyond basic RAG into production-grade architectures — hybrid vector and keyword search, cross-encoder re-ranking, multi-hop reasoning, and context compression for systems that demand high answer accuracy and low hallucination rates.

items.title: LLM Fine-Tuning & Optimization
items.desc: Mastering parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT) for adapting large language models to domain-specific tasks with minimal compute. Exploring GGUF quantization and efficient local deployment via Ollama and llama.cpp.

items.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
items.desc: Implementing Anthropic's Model Context Protocol to build standardised, composable AI tool integrations. Enabling richer agentic workflows by connecting LLMs to live data sources, external APIs, and enterprise systems through a unified interface.
